content:
🔥 netwatch | Rust
🎯 Primary Use Case: Real-time network monitoring and troubleshooting directly within the terminal, providing both a broad overview and detailed packet-level insights.
✨ Key Features: • Real-time network diagnostics • Terminal-based interface (TUI) • Interface statistics with sparklines • Connection monitoring with process names and PIDs • Gateway and DNS health checks with latency heatmap
📖 Summary: NetWatch is a real-time network diagnostics tool for the terminal, offering instant visibility into network interfaces, connections, and packet data. It provides both high-level overviews and deep packet inspection capabilities, along with a flight recorder feature to capture transient network events.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
